name: PBMC Isolation by Density Gradient Centrifugation (Ficoll/Percoll)
nameCn: 密度梯度离心法分离外周血单个核细胞（PBMC）

components.name: 1. Collect blood in EDTA or heparin tubes; process within 2 h

note.en: EDTA (purple cap) preferred. Heparin (green cap) acceptable. Serum (red cap) is NOT suitable. Each 10 mL blood yields ~1–3×10⁷ PBMC. Keep blood at RT (not 4°C — causes platelet aggregation).
note.zh: 优选 EDTA 管（紫盖）。肝素管（绿盖）可用。血清管（红盖）不适用。每 10 mL 血液可分离约 1–3×10⁷ PBMC。室温保存（不要 4°C——血小板聚集）。

components.name: 2. Dilute blood 1:1 with PBS (room temperature) in 50 mL conical tube

note.en: E.g., 10 mL blood + 10 mL PBS. Mix gently by inversion 3×. Dilution reduces viscosity and improves interface formation.
note.zh: 例如 10 mL 血 + 10 mL PBS。轻柔颠倒混合 3 次。稀释降低黏度，改善界面形成。

components.name: 3. Carefully layer diluted blood over Ficoll-Paque (density 1.077 g/mL)

note.en: Add 15 mL Ficoll-Paque to 50 mL tube first (pre-warmed to RT). Then slowly pipette diluted blood down the tube wall to form a sharp interface — do NOT mix layers. Ratio: 3 mL diluted blood per 1 mL Ficoll (up to 35 mL diluted blood per 15 mL Ficoll). Self-prepared: use ficoll_solution (density 1.077). Alternative: Percoll at 77% IPS (percoll_gradient_buffer).
note.zh: 先在 50 mL 管中加 15 mL Ficoll-Paque（预热至 RT）。沿管壁缓慢加入稀释血，形成清晰界面——勿混层。比例：每 1 mL Ficoll 对应 3 mL 稀释血液。自配：ficoll_solution（密度 1.077）。替代方案：77% Percoll IPS（percoll_gradient_buffer）。

components.name: 4. Centrifuge: 400×g, 30–40 min, RT; brake OFF (no deceleration!)

note.en: Critical: turn off brake and acceleration ramp must be low (set to 1–2 on Beckman/Eppendorf). High brake disrupts interface. Layers from top to bottom: plasma+platelets / PBMC buffy coat / Ficoll / RBC+granulocyte pellet.
note.zh: 关键：关闭制动，加速度设为低档（Beckman/Eppendorf 设为 1–2）。急刹车会破坏界面。从上至下层次：血浆+血小板 / PBMC 灰白层 / Ficoll / 红细胞+粒细胞沉淀。

components.name: 5. Collect buffy coat (PBMC layer) with Pasteur pipette; avoid Ficoll layer

note.en: Use wide-bore pipette. Aspirate ~2 cm above and below the buffy coat ring. Transfer to new 50 mL tube. Bring volume to 50 mL with PBS to dilute Ficoll.
note.zh: 用宽口吸管。在灰白层上下约 2 cm 范围内吸取。转入新 50 mL 管。PBS 补至 50 mL 稀释 Ficoll。

components.name: 6. Wash 2× with PBS: 300×g, 10 min, RT; discard supernatant

note.en: First wash: 300×g 10 min RT (removes Ficoll and platelets). Second wash: 200×g 10 min RT (further removes platelets — they pellet at higher g). Platelet removal important for downstream functional assays.
note.zh: 第一次洗涤：300×g 10 min RT（去除 Ficoll 和血小板）。第二次：200×g 10 min RT（进一步去除血小板——血小板在更高离心力下沉淀）。去血小板对下游功能实验很重要。

components.name: 7. Lyse residual RBC (if needed): RBC lysis buffer 5 min RT; wash 1× PBS

note.en: Usually not needed with proper Ficoll step. If red contamination persists: 1× BD Pharm Lyse (1 mL per 10⁷ cells) 5 min RT; quench with PBS; 400×g 5 min. Or ACK lysis buffer (150 mM NH₄Cl, 10 mM KHCO₃, 0.1 mM EDTA).
note.zh: Ficoll 分离正确时通常不需要。若残余红细胞较多：1× BD Pharm Lyse（1 mL/10⁷ 细胞）RT 5 min；PBS 终止；400×g 5 min。或 ACK 裂解液（150 mM NH₄Cl、10 mM KHCO₃、0.1 mM EDTA）。

components.name: 8. Count cells (trypan blue); assess viability (should be >90%)

note.en: Use cell_counting_hemocytometer. Expected yield: 1–2×10⁶ PBMC/mL whole blood. Viability <90% indicates delay in processing, wrong temperature, or excessive RBC lysis. PBMC composition: ~70–80% T cells, ~10–15% B cells, ~10–15% NK cells, ~10–20% monocytes.
note.zh: cell_counting_hemocytometer 计数。预期产率：1–2×10⁶ PBMC/mL 全血。活力 <90% 提示处理延迟、温度不当或 RBC 裂解过度。PBMC 组成：~70–80% T 细胞、~10–15% B 细胞、~10–15% NK 细胞、~10–20% 单核细胞。

components.name: 9. Proceed to downstream use, or cryopreserve in 10% DMSO/90% FBS

note.en: Immediate use: resuspend in complete RPMI (complete_rpmi). Cryopreservation (cell_freezing): 10% DMSO + 90% FBS; slow-freeze (CoolCell or isopropanol box −80°C); transfer to LN₂ for long-term storage. Thaw gently: 37°C water bath, dilute in warm RPMI, centrifuge 300×g 10 min to remove DMSO.
note.zh: 立即使用：complete_rpmi 重悬。冻存（cell_freezing）：10% DMSO + 90% FBS；缓慢降温（CoolCell 或异丙醇盒 −80°C）；长期储存转入液氮。复苏：37°C 水浴，温 RPMI 稀释，300×g 10 min 去除 DMSO。

notes.en: PBMC isolation is density-dependent: lymphocytes and monocytes (density 1.055–1.077 g/mL) float on Ficoll (1.077); granulocytes (1.080–1.100) and RBC (1.090–1.110) pellet through. Freshness matters: process within 2 h of collection for best viability and function. For mouse blood: use Percoll gradient (1.083 g/mL density). For bone marrow: same principle, but pre-lyse RBC first.
notes.zh: PBMC 分离基于密度差：淋巴细胞和单核细胞（密度 1.055–1.077 g/mL）浮在 Ficoll（1.077）界面；粒细胞（1.080–1.100）和红细胞（1.090–1.110）沉底。新鲜度关键：采血后 2 h 内处理，保证活力和功能。小鼠血液：用 Percoll 梯度（密度 1.083）。骨髓：原理相同，但需先裂解红细胞。

ref: Böyum (1968) Scand J Clin Lab Invest Suppl 97:77–89; Corkum & Bhatt (2015) JOVE e52629; GE Healthcare Ficoll-Paque PLUS Handbook 2012
